public_site_changes: Added 延宕 to the status filter option list so the UI matches the requested status taxonomy.
Added the English label Delayed for the bilingual status selector and project labels.
Refreshed the active data cache key so browsers reload the current active GeoJSON after this UI change.
active_data_policy_note: Delayed records remain outside the active homepage dataset unless they also satisfy the current active data rules. The filter is present for taxonomy completeness and future inactive or candidate views.
public_goal_safety_check: No private accumulation target numbers were added to public website copy or public data fields.
